%3F%20null%3B%20%7D%2C%20getDtsg()%20%7B%20return%20window%3F.DTSGInitialData%3F.token%20%3F%3F%20null%3B%20%7D%2C%20getSiteData()%20%7B%20return%20window%3F.SiteData%20%3F%3F%20null%3B%20%7D%20%7D%3B%20%2F%2F%20src%2FFBInspector%2Fcore%2Fapi.js%20var%20buildUrl%20%3D%20(path%2C%20params%20%3D%20%7B%7D)%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20const%20cleanPath%20%3D%20String(path%20%7C%7C%20%22%22).replace(%2F%5E%5C%2F%2B%2F%2C%20%22%22)%3B%20const%20url%20%3D%20new%20URL(cleanPath%2C%20GRAPH_API_BASE)%3B%20Object.entries(params).forEach((%5Bkey%2C%20value%5D)%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20if%20(value%20!%3D%3D%20void%200%20%26%26%20value%20!%3D%3D%20null%20%26%26%20value%20!%3D%3D%20%22%22)%20%7B%20url.searchParams.set(key%2C%20String(value))%3B%20%7D%20%7D)%3B%20return%20url%3B%20%7D%3B%20var%20normalizeError%20%3D%20(error)%20%3D%3E%20(%7B%20message%3A%20error%3F.message%20%7C%7C%20%22%5Cu041D%5Cu0435%5Cu0438%5Cu0437%5Cu0432%5Cu0435%5Cu0441%5Cu0442%5Cu043D%5Cu0430%5Cu044F%20%5Cu043E%5Cu0448%5Cu0438%5Cu0431%5Cu043A%5Cu0430%20API%22%2C%20code%3A%20error%3F.code%20%7C%7C%20%22API_ERROR%22%2C%20raw%3A%20error%20%7D)%3B%20var%20withRetry%20%3D%20async%20(fn%2C%20options%20%3D%20%7B%7D)%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20const%20retries%20%3D%20options.retries%20%3F%3F%202%3B%20const%20delayMs%20%3D%20options.delayMs%20%3F%3F%20400%3B%20let%20lastError%3B%20for%20(let%20attempt%20%3D%200%3B%20attempt%20%3C%3D%20retries%3B%20attempt%20%2B%3D%201)%20%7B%20try%20%7B%20return%20await%20fn(attempt)%3B%20%7D%20catch%20(error)%20%7B%20lastError%20%3D%20error%3B%20if%20(attempt%20%3D%3D%3D%20retries)%20%7B%20break%3B%20%7D%20await%20new%20Promise((resolve)%20%3D%3E%20setTimeout(resolve%2C%20delayMs%20*%20(attempt%20%2B%201)))%3B%20%7D%20%7D%20throw%20lastError%3B%20%7D%3B%20var%20request%20%3D%20async%20(method%2C%20path%2C%20%7B%20params%20%3D%20%7B%7D%2C%20body%2C%20accessToken%2C%20retries%20%7D%20%3D%20%7B%7D)%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20if%20(!accessToken)%20%7B%20throw%20%7B%20message%3A%20%22Access%20token%20%5Cu043D%5Cu0435%20%5Cu04 20options%20%3D%20%7B%7D)%20%3D%3E%20request(%22DELETE%22%2C%20path%2C%20%7B%20...options%2C%20params%20%7D)%2C%20getAllPages%2C%20withRetry%2C%20normalizeError%20%7D%3B%20%2F%2F%20src%2FFBInspector%2Fcore%2Flogger.js%20var%20timestamp%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20(%2F*%20%40__PURE__%20*%2F%20new%20Date()).toLocaleTimeString(%22ru-RU%22%2C%20%7B%20hour12%3A%20false%20%7D)%3B%20var%20emit%20%3D%20(level%2C%20message%2C%20meta%20%3D%20%7B%7D)%20%3D%3E%20(%7B%20level%2C%20message%2C%20meta%2C%20ts%3A%20timestamp()%20%7D)%3B%20var%20logger%20%3D%20%7B%20info%3A%20(message%2C%20meta)%20%3D%3E%20emit(%22info%22%2C%20message%2C%20meta)%2C%20success%3A%20(message%2C%20meta)%20%3D%3E%20emit(%22success%22%2C%20message%2C%20meta)%2C%20warning%3A%20(message%2C%20meta)%20%3D%3E%20emit(%22warning%22%2C%20message%2C%20meta)%2C%20error%3A%20(message%2C%20meta)%20%3D%3E%20emit(%22error%22%2C%20message%2C%20meta)%20%7D%3B%20%2F%2F%20src%2FFBInspector%2Fcore%2Futils.js%20var%20safeRemoveNode%20%3D%20(node)%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20if%20(node%20%26%26%20node.parentNode)%20%7B%20node.parentNode.removeChild(node)%3B%20%7D%20%7D%3B%20%2F%2F%20src%2FFBInspector%2Fui%2Fstyles.js%20var%20baseStyles%20%3D%20%60%20%23fbinspector-root%20%7B%20all%3A%20initial%3B%20position%3A%20fixed%3B%20top%3A%2020px%3B%20right%3A%2020px%3B%20z-index%3A%202147483647%3B%20font-family%3A%20Inter%2C%20%22Segoe%20UI%22%2C%20Arial%2C%20sans-serif%3B%20color%3A%20%23e8fff0%3B%20%7D%20%60%3B%20%2F%2F%20src%2FFBInspector%2Fui%2Ftabs.js%20var%20createTabs%20%3D%20(%7B%20root%2C%20tabs%2C%20onSelect%20%7D)%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20const%20wrapper%20%3D%20document.createElement(%22div%22)%3B%20wrapper.style.display%20%3D%20%22flex%22%3B%20wrapper.style.gap%20%3D%20%226px%22%3B%20wrapper.style.marginTop%20%3D%20%2210px%22%3B%20wrapper.style.marginBottom%20%3D%20%2210px%22%3B%20const%20buttons%20%3D%20%2F*%20%40__PURE__%20*%2F%20new%20Map()%3B%20const%20setActiveTab%20%3D%20(id)%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20buttons.forEach((button%2C%20tabId)%20%3D%3E%20%7 20var%20createShell%20%3D%20(%7B%20root%2C%20tabs%2C%20onSelect%20%7D)%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20const%20container%20%3D%20document.createElement(%22div%22)%3B%20container.innerHTML%20%3D%20%60%20%3Cdiv%20style%3D%22background%3A%230f1715%3Bborder%3A1px%20solid%20%232b433a%3Bborder-radius%3A14px%3Bpadding%3A14px%3Bmin-width%3A320px%3Bmax-width%3A560px%3B%22%3E%20%3Cdiv%20style%3D%22display%3Aflex%3Bjustify-content%3Aspace-between%3Balign-items%3Aflex-start%3Bgap%3A8px%3B%22%3E%20%3Cdiv%3E%20%3Cdiv%20style%3D%22font-size%3A20px%3Bfont-weight%3A800%3Bcolor%3A%234dff8f%3Bline-height%3A1.05%3B%22%3EFBInspector%3C%2Fdiv%3E%20%3Cdiv%20style%3D%22font-size%3A11px%3Bcolor%3A%2399b3a6%3B%22%3EPhase%202%20Read-only%20Inspector%3C%2Fdiv%3E%20%3C%2Fdiv%3E%20%3C%2Fdiv%3E%20%3Cdiv%20data-role%3D%22tabs%22%3E%3C%2Fdiv%3E%20%3Cdiv%20data-role%3D%22table%22%3E%3C%2Fdiv%3E%20%3Cdiv%20style%3D%22margin-top%3A10px%3Bfont-size%3A12px%3Bcolor%3A%23c7e0d2%3B%22%3E%5Cu041B%5Cu043E%5Cu0433%20%5Cu0438%5Cu043D%5Cu0438%5Cu0446%5Cu0438%5Cu0430%5Cu043B%5Cu0438%5Cu0437%5Cu0430%5Cu0446%5Cu0438%5Cu0438%3C%2Fdiv%3E%20%3Cpre%20data-role%3D%22log%22%20style%3D%22margin-top%3A6px%3Bbackground%3A%230b1210%3Bborder%3A1px%20solid%20%2322372f%3Bborder-radius%3A10px%3Bpadding%3A8px%3Bmin-height%3A100px%3Bmax-height%3A180px%3Boverflow%3Aauto%3Bfont-size%3A12px%3Bcolor%3A%23e8fff0%3B%22%3E%3C%2Fpre%3E%20%3C%2Fdiv%3E%20%60%3B%20root.appendChild(container)%3B%20const%20logEl%20%3D%20container.querySelector('%5Bdata-role%3D%22log%22%5D')%3B%20const%20tabsRoot%20%3D%20container.querySelector('%5Bdata-role%3D%22tabs%22%5D')%3B%20const%20tableRoot%20%3D%20container.querySelector('%5Bdata-role%3D%22table%22%5D')%3B%20const%20tabsUi%20%3D%20createTabs(%7B%20root%3A%20tabsRoot%2C%20tabs%2C%20onSelect%20%7D)%3B%20const%20tableUi%20%3D%20createTable(%7B%20root%3A%20tableRoot%20%7D)%3B%20return%20%7B%20appendLog(entry)%20%7B%20const%20line%20%3D%20%60%5B%24%7Bentry.ts%7D%5D%20%5B%24%7Bentry.level%7D%5D%20%24%7Bentry.message%7D%60%3B%20logEl.textContent%20%2B%3D%20%60%24%7Bline%7D%20%60%3B%20logEl.scrollTop%20%3D%20logEl.scrollHeight%3B%20%7D%2C%20renderRows(rows)%20%7B%20tableUi.render(rows)%3B%20%7D%2C%20destroy()%20%7B%20tabsUi.destroy()%3B%20tableUi.destroy()%3B%20if%20(container.parentNode%20%3D%3D%3D%20root)%20%7B%20root.removeChild(container)%3B%20%7D%20%7D%20%7D%3B%20%7D%3B%20%2F%2F%20src%2FFBInspector%2Fmodules%2Faccounts.js%20var%20accountsModule%20%3D%20%7B%20id%3A%20%22accounts%22%2C%20title%3A%20%22%5Cu0410%5Cu043A%5Cu043A%5Cu0430%5Cu0443%5Cu043D%5Cu0442%5Cu044B%22%2C%20async%20load(%7B%20accessToken%20%7D)%20%7B%20const%20data%20%3D%20await%20fbApi.get(%22me%2Fadaccounts%22%2C%20%7B%20fields%3A%20%22id%2Cname%2Caccount_status%2Ccurrency%2Ctimezone_name%2Cbusiness%22%2C%20limit%3A%2050%20%7D%2C%20%7B%20accessToken%2C%20retries%3A%201%20%7D)%3B%20return%20data.data%20%7C%7C%20%5B%5D%3B%20%7D%20%7D%3B%20%2F%2F%20src%2FFBInspector%2Fmodules%2Fbusinesses.js%20var%20businessesModule%20%3D%20%7B%20id%3A%20%22businesses%22%2C%20title%3A%20%22%5Cu0411%5Cu0438%5Cu0437%5Cu043D%5Cu0435%5Cu0441%5Cu044B%22%2C%20async%20load(%7B%20accessToken%20%7D)%20%7B%20const%20data%20%3D%20await%20fbApi.get(%22me%2Fbusinesses%22%2C%20%7B%20fields%3A%20%22id%2Cname%2Cverification_status%22%2C%20limit%3A%2050%20%7D%2C%20%7B%20accessToken%2C%20retries%3A%201%20%7D)%3B%20return%20data.data%20%7C%7C%20%5B%5D%3B%20%7D%20%7D%3B%20%2F%2F%20src%2FFBInspector%2Fmodules%2Fpages.js%20var%20pagesModule%20%3D%20%7B%20id%3A%20%22pages%22%2C%20title%3A%20%22%5Cu0421%5Cu0442%5Cu0440%5Cu0430%5Cu043D%5Cu0438%5Cu0446%5Cu044B%22%2C%20async%20load(%7B%20accessToken%20%7D)%20%7B%20const%20data%20%3D%20await%20fbApi.get(%22me%2Faccounts%22%2C%20%7B%20fields%3A%20%22id%2Cname%2Ccategory%22%2C%20limit%3A%2050%20%7D%2C%20%7B%20accessToken%2C%20retries%3A%201%20%7D)%3B%20return%20data.data%20%7C%7C%20%5B%5D%3B%20%7D%20%7D%3B%20%2F%2F%20src%2FFBInspector%2Fmodules%2Fbilling.js%20var%20billingModule%20%3D%20%7B%20id%3A%20%22billing%22%2C%20title%3A%20%22%5Cu0411%5Cu0438%5Cu043B%5Cu043B%5Cu0438%5Cu043D%5Cu0433%22%2C%20async%20load()%20%7B%20return%20%5B%5D%3B%20%7D%20%7D%3B%20%2F%2F%20src%2FFBInspector%2Fmodules%2Fads.js%20var%20adsModule%20%3D%20%7B%20id%3A%20%22ads%22%2C%20title%3A%20%22%5Cu041E%5Cu0431%5Cu044A%5Cu044F%5Cu0432%5Cu043B%5Cu0435%5Cu043D%5Cu0438%5Cu044F%22%2C%20async%20load()%20%7B%20return%20%5B%5D%3B%20%7D%20%7D%3B%20%2F%2F%20src%2FFBInspector%2Fmodules%2Fdiagnostics.js%20var%20diagnosticsModule%20%3D%20%7B%20id%3A%20%22diagnostics%22%2C%20title%3A%20%22%5Cu0414%5Cu0438%5Cu0430%5Cu0433%5Cu043D%5Cu043E%5Cu0441%5Cu0442%5Cu0438%5Cu043A%5Cu0430%22%2C%20async%20load(%7B%20accessToken%20%7D)%20%7B%20const%20me%20%3D%20await%20fbApi.get(%22me%22%2C%20%7B%20fields%3A%20%22id%2Cname%22%20%7D%2C%20%7B%20accessToken%2C%20retries%3A%201%20%7D)%3B%20return%20%5Bme%5D%3B%20%7D%20%7D%3B%20%2F%2F%20src%2FFBInspector%2Findex.js%20var%20phase2Modules%20%3D%20%5B%20accountsModule%2C%20businessesModule%2C%20pagesModule%2C%20billingModule%2C%20adsModule%2C%20diagnosticsModule%20%5D%3B%20var%20mountStyles%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20const%20style%20%3D%20document.createElement(%22style%22)%3B%20style.id%20%3D%20FBINSPECTOR_STYLE_ID%3B%20style.textContent%20%3D%20baseStyles%3B%20document.head.appendChild(style)%3B%20return%20style%3B%20%7D%3B%20var%20mountRoot%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20const%20root%20%3D%20document.createElement(%22div%22)%3B%20root.id%20%3D%20FBINSPECTOR_ROOT_ID%3B%20document.body.appendChild(root)%3B%20return%20root%3B%20%7D%3B%20var%20createInstance%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20const%20style%20%3D%20mountStyles()%3B%20const%20root%20%3D%20mountRoot()%3B%20const%20token%20%3D%20authService.getAccessToken()%3B%20const%20loadModule%20%3D%20async%20(shell2%2C%20moduleId)%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20const%20selectedModule%20%3D%20phase2Modules.find((item)%20%3D%3E%20item.id%20%3D%3D%3D%20moduleId)%3B%20if%20(!selectedModule)%20%7B%20shell2.appendLog(logger.warning(%60%5Cu041C%5Cu043E%5Cu0434%5Cu0443%5Cu043B%5Cu044C%20%24%7BmoduleId%7D%20%5Cu043D%5Cu0435%20%5Cu043D%5Cu0430%5Cu0439%5Cu0434%5Cu0435%5Cu043D%60))%3B%20return%3B%20%7D%20if%20(!token)%20%7B%20shell2.appendLog(logger.error(%22%5Cu0422%5Cu043E%5Cu043A%5Cu0435%5Cu043D%20%5Cu0434%5Cu043E%5Cu0441%5Cu0442%5Cu0443%5Cu043F%5Cu0430%20%5Cu043D%5Cu0435%20%5Cu043D%5Cu0430%5Cu0439%5Cu0434%5Cu0435%5Cu043D.%20%5Cu0417%5Cu0430%5Cu043F%5Cu0443%5Cu0441%5Cu0442%5Cu0438%5Cu0442%5Cu0435%20%5Cu0441%5Cu043A%5Cu0440%5Cu0438%5Cu043F%5Cu0442%20%5Cu0432%20Ads%20Manager.%22))%3B%20shell2.renderRows(%5B%5D)%3B%20return%3B%20%7D%20shell2.appendLog(logger.info(%60%5Cu0417%5Cu0430%5Cu0433%5Cu0440%5Cu0443%5Cu0437%5Cu043A%5Cu0430%20%5Cu0432%5Cu043A%5Cu043B%5Cu0430%5Cu0434%5Cu043A%5Cu0438%3A%20%24%7BselectedModule.title%7D%60))%3B%20try%20%7B%20const%20rows%20%3D%20await%20selectedModule.load(%7B%20accessToken%3A%20token%20%7D)%3B%20shell2.renderRows(rows)%3B%20shell2.appendLog(logger.success(%60%5Cu0417%5Cu0430%5Cu0433%5Cu0440%5Cu0443%5Cu0436%5Cu0435%5Cu043D%5Cu043E%20%5Cu0437%5Cu0430%5Cu043F%5Cu0438%5Cu0441%5Cu0435%5Cu0439%3A%20%24%7Brows.length%7D%60))%3B%20%7D%20catch%20(error)%20%7B%20const%20normalized%20%3D%20fbApi.normalizeError(error)%3B%20shell2.appendLog(logger.error(%60%5Cu041E%5Cu0448%5Cu0438%5Cu0431%5Cu043A%5Cu0430%20%5Cu0437%5Cu0430%5Cu0433%5Cu0440%5Cu0443%5Cu0437%5Cu043A%5Cu0438%20%24%7BselectedModule.title%7D%3A%20%24%7Bnormalized.message%7D%60))%3B%20shell2.renderRows(%5B%5D)%3B%20%7D%20%7D%3B%20const%20shell%20%3D%20createShell(%7B%20root%2C%20tabs%3A%20phase2Modules%2C%20onSelect%3A%20(moduleId)%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20loadModule(shell%2C%20moduleId)%3B%20%7D%20%7D)%3B%20shell.appendLog(logger.info(%22Shell%20%5Cu0441%5Cu043C%5Cu043E%5Cu043D%5Cu0442%5Cu0438%5Cu0440%5Cu043E%5Cu0432%5Cu0430%5Cu043D%22))%3B%20loadModule(shell%2C%20phase2Modules%5B0%5D.id)%3B%20return%20%7B%20destroy()%20%7B%20shell.appendLog(logger.warning(%22Destroy%20%5Cu0432%5Cu044B%5Cu0437%5Cu0432%5Cu0430%5Cu043D%2C%20%5Cu0432%5Cu044B%5Cu043F%5Cu043E%5Cu043B%5Cu043D%5Cu044F%5Cu044E%20cleanup%22))%3B%20shell.destroy()%3B%20safeRemoveNode(root)%3B%20safeRemoveNode(style)%3B%20if%20(window%5BFBINSPECTOR_INSTANCE_KEY%5D%20%3D%3D%3D%20this)%20%7B%20delete%20window%5BFBINSPECTOR_INSTANCE_KEY%5D%3B%20%7D%20%7D%20%7D%3B%20%7D%3B%20var%20launch%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20const%20existing%20%3D%20window%5BFBINSPECTOR_INSTANCE_KEY%5D%3B%20if%20(existing%20%26%26%20typeof%20existing.destroy%20%3D%3D%3D%20%22function%22)%20%7B%20existing.destroy()%3B%20%7D%20const%20instance%20%3D%20createInstance()%3B%20window%5BFBINSPECTOR_INSTANCE_KEY%5D%20%3D%20instance%3B%20return%20instance%3B%20%7D%3B%20launch()%3B%20%7D)()%3B
